CONTENT.Club career: On 13 May 2018, Mamas made his senior debut for AEK Larnaca, playing the full ninety minutes in a 3–2 win over AEL Limassol.On 26 July 2018, Mamas was an unused substitute in Larnaca's 0–0 draw away to Dundalk in the UEFA Europa League but the next month, he joined Serie A club Napoli.In September 2020, Mamas joined Serie B side SPAL.On 19 July 2021, Mamas returned to AEK Larnaca after three years in Italy.
CONTENT.External links: Rafail Mamas at National-Football-Teams.comRafail Mamas at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Mamas has represented Cyprus at under-17 level. In October 2021, he received his first call-up to the senior squad for 2022 FIFA World Cup qualifying matches against Croatia and Malta following an injury to Andreas Karo. He was an unused substitute in both matches. He made his debut on 11 November 2021 in a World Cup qualifier against Russia.

SUMMARY: Rafail Mamas (Greek: Ραφαήλ Μάμας; born 4 March 2001) is a Cypriot professional footballer who plays midfielder for AEL Limassol.
